title: tragacantha eriocarpa
intro: Tragacantha eriocarpa, also known as Globe Salsify, is a perennial plant species within the dandelion family, characterized by its edible root and yellow or white flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Tragacantha eriocarpa include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve digestion, and act as an antioxidant. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or dried root supplement, and is often used in herbal remedies for its potential health benefits.
